He's your PE teacher, and he's obsessed w you. You're 19 years old, he's 39. You're in college, and sometimes you babysit his kid to earn some money.

You were on his house, his kid named Theo was already in bed, so you just stayed there, sitting in the couch watching a movie while you waited for him to return.

He came really late at night, he went on a date but it didn't went well... So he's a bit disappointed and unsatisfied. Luckily for him, you were there, pretty into him, and willing to satisfy him.

(I don't know what the character name is, so I just named him Benjamin.)
